svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="afJGJO-3rCqNq9nYNaYm"> <mxGraphModel dx="1099" dy="726" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="systemd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#64B5F6;strokeWidth=2;align=center;" value="<b>systemd</b>
sarifraz-supervisor.service
(auto-start on boot, restart=always)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="400" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sup_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F4F1DE;strokeColor=#A3A380;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=10;" value="<b>revpi_supervisor.py</b>
State Machine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="340" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_boot" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A3A380;" value="BOOTING
wait_for_io()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="150" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_idle" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A3A380;" value="IDLE" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="150" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_prod" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A3A380;" value="PRODUCING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="150" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_stop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A3A380;" value="STOPPING" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="95" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_emerg" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A3A380;" value="EMERGENCY_STOP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="265" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="state_stopped" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#A3A380;" value="STOPPED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="150" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="worker_container" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#81C784;strokeWidth=2;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;spacingTop=10;" value="<b>cycle_worker.py</b>
(subprocess.Popen)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="340" x="620" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#81C784;" value="Belt Forward (PWM_1 → I_2)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="690" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#81C784;" value="Punch Down (PWM_4 → I_4)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="690" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#81C784;" value="Punch Up (PWM_3 → I_3)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="690" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#81C784;" value="Belt Reverse (PWM_2 → I_1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="690" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#81C784;" value="Publish cycle/features" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="690" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="broker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE4EC;strokeColor=#F06292;strokeWidth=2;" value="<b>EMQX Broker</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="440" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="systemd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=default;" target="sup_container" value="launches"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="sup_container" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=default;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="worker_container" value="subprocess.Popen"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="420" y="390" as="sourcePoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=default;" target="broker" value="factory/line1/runtime
/cycle/features"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2432" y="10" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="790" y="730" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge4" edge="1" parent="1" source="sup_container" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=default;exitX=1.005;exitY=0.877;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" target="broker" value="heartbeat every 2s"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.2554" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge5" edge="1" parent="1" source="broker" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;labelBackgroundColor=default;" target="sup_container" value="commands
(START/STOP/RESET 
EMERGENCY_STOP/SET_SPEED)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5714" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_boot" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="state_idle" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NxLon0jGtHqXrrejOS8o-2" connectable="0" parent="t1" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="<font style="font-size: 9px;">io ready</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.302" y="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="29" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_idle" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;fontSize=8;" target="state_prod" value="START_PRODUCTION"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3333" y="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_prod" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="state_stop" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NxLon0jGtHqXrrejOS8o-4" connectable="0" parent="t3" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;">STOP_PRODUCTION</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.1741" y="2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-36" y="-7" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t4" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_prod" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="state_emerg" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NxLon0jGtHqXrrejOS8o-3" connectable="0" parent="t4" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="<font style="font-size: 8px;">EMERGENCY_STOP</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0975" y="-2" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="41" y="-7" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t5" edge="1" parent="1" source="state_stop" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="state_stopped" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="NxLon0jGtHqXrrejOS8o-5" connectable="0" parent="t5" style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];" value="<font style="font-size: 9px;">worker exits</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2111" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w1" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="step2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w2" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="step3" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="step4" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="w4" edge="1" parent="1" source="step4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=1;" target="step5" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_box" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=5;" value="<b>Legend</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="950" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_line1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;" value="Solid: Control Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="955" y="720" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend_line2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=10;" value="Labeled: Messaging" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="140" x="955" y="735" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
